description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.
Malaysian cuisine (Malay: Masakan Malaysia; Jawi: ماسقن مليسيا‎) consists of cooking traditions and practices found in Malaysia, and reflects the multi-ethnic makeup of its population.

description: public university in Berkeley, California, USA
description_wiki: The University of California, Berkeley (UC Berkeley, Berkeley, Cal, or California) is a public land-grant research university in the Southside and Northside neighborhoods of Berkeley, California, United States.

description: rapid transit system in the San Francisco Bay Area, California, United States
description_wiki: Bay Area Rapid Transit (BART) is a rapid transit system serving the San Francisco Bay Area in California.

description: commuter rail line between San Francisco and Gilroy in California
description_wiki: Caltrain (reporting mark JPBX) is a commuter rail line in California, serving the San Francisco Peninsula and Santa Clara Valley (Silicon Valley).

description: Federal territory and capital city of Malaysia
description_wiki: Kuala Lumpur (KL), officially the Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, is the capital city and a federal territory of Malaysia.
